pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py explicit checks for this target path.
export_result.sh checks for this specific PDF file.
export_result.sh checks for this specific PNG file.
setup_task.sh explicitly copies NDRT_Rocket_2020.ork into the VM.
verifier.py states Pass threshold: 70 and checks passed = score >= 70.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a real-world dataset: the NDRT_Rocket_2020.ork design file corresponds to the Notre Dame Rocket Team 2020 NASA Student Launch competition rocket. The verifier.py logic explicitly requires the target ORK path to be /home/ga/Documents/rockets/pr_rocket.ork and scores passing strictly at >= 70 points. The PDF export is verified at /home/ga/Documents/exports/telemetry_plot.pdf by checking magic bytes, and the PNG render is checked for exact 1920x1080 dimensions at /home/ga/Documents/exports/rocket_render.png.
